name: ames-standalone-skills
description: Oliver's original Claude Code skills covering writing, development, automation, finance, and AI tools (34 skills).

interface.shortDescription: General-purpose skills for writing, automation, and Apple workflows.
interface.longDescription: A broad skill pack covering writing, development, automation, finance, Apple platform workflows, and transcription. Includes skills for Apple Notes, Apple Music, Audible, Drafts, iOS/macOS app builds, TestFlight, tone/voice, file organization, and more.
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this recording and clean it up.
Generate an Apple Watch workout from this plan.
Draft this note in Oliver's tone.
